title: Wild Aside
description: Explore the Bacteria Infected Vibrion Hive and the colourful Glowing Hickory Forest!
body:
Wild Aside

3 new beautiful fantasy biomes!

Vibrion Hive

A bacteria infected cave filled with vegetation and particles. Not hostile until you get contaminated...

![Vibrion Hive](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/pw/AP1GczM6fn6wkiqd8Ji-BPyA2VIAmpRKriVhaGrxgS41CtFQ9KdLammX1-iD8mI7ei370jFaYFMNTCKsaQ6zlK_zAOHQ4s4IhdHAYyqLGp-tn6f_q-07=w2400) ![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/pw/AP1GczMHUt2i18CJ4u8SIKKE-EeY6QJhsr-EfiUSZegKdgnaltu5J_v38FvaAd-CElMY1I98B9yFo385O632l7pqOrxTUvjOJvjSRg-OhcZWpSdLyeClSOI=w2400) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/699895/description_cfd728a3-e205-422d-9f0c-8172578a8d6a.png)

Hickory Forest

## The leaves sway graciously, with their movement effected by wind and the weather. ![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/pw/AP1GczOvk2OpK3LNvIyPO6xkeO-zz4hRn2h_HBSsMUcJGeLRPwZZcH1tHDSkFWMuq6W9qLBhQ4CskSVlYcX8OelLSKzOnkBjxHz7MVLiyxaDisZHlA13=w2400)

Glowing Hickory Forest

## A variant of the Hickory Forest, but the leaves have 4 different colours and glow during night! ![glowing hickory forest](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/pw/AP1GczO0UPuAQSBHJWKnSoUUx1TJe4Qds9Tfw4dXzr3Y2ObzKaH1MO7Dfil0pqgaMThAV-5Jm4mfti5yxkQk_Zm-XvBywMT6rAjyywU92wln4LVfgswy=w2400)

Versions after 2.0 require Terrablender! Versions after 2.2.0 support Patchouli!
Versions before 2.0 might require Geckolib!

Join my Discord server!
